message:
licensing: adopt MIT + OpenAI/Anthropic rider across workspace

Summary:
- Add a root LICENSE file containing the full "MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider)" text.
- Replace workspace-level SPDX `license = "MIT"` metadata with `license-file = "LICENSE"` to avoid publishing contradictory plain-MIT metadata.
- Update all crate manifests to reference the root rider license file via `license-file = "../../LICENSE"`.
- Update README license section to point directly at the rider license text.

Why this shape:
- Cargo metadata and repo docs must reflect the same legal terms as the canonical LICENSE file.
- Explicit `license-file` references per crate keep packaging metadata unambiguous for each published crate.
- This is intentionally a metadata-only change: no runtime or behavior changes.

Files touched:
- LICENSE (new)
- Cargo.toml (workspace.package license metadata)
- README.md (license section)
- crates/*/Cargo.toml package license metadata for all workspace crates

files.patch:

+testing, analyzing, indexing, or incorporating the Software or any Derivative

+
+This rider applies to the Software and all Derivative Works. As a condition of

+
+Any breach of this rider automatically and immediately terminates the

+
+You agree that a breach of this rider would cause irreparable harm and that

+
+For purposes of this rider, "Affiliate" means any entity that directly or
+indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with the
+specified party. "Control" means ownership of more than 50% of the voting
+securities or other ownership interest, or the power to direct management or

+
+The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all

+OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE
+SOFTWARE.

@@ -697,4 +697,4 @@ Please don't take this the wrong way, but I do not accept outside contributions

-MIT
+MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider). See `LICENSE`.
